common.noAutoDirectorTask: No auto-director task detected. List shown by basic novel assets.
common.autoDirectorRunning: AI is advancing the project in background

actions.continueAutoExecuteFailed: Failed to continue auto-executing the current chapter range.

list.loadErrorDescription: Cannot read the project list right now. You can try again.
list.emptyDescription: First time? We recommend tapping "Start with AI auto-director" in the top right so the system can set up direction and prep for you.
list.emptyFilteredDescription: Adjust the filters above, or just create a new novel project.
list.confirmDelete: Delete "{{title}}"? This will remove the novel immediately.
list.cockpitDescription: View the AI progress and next action for "{{title}}".
list.cockpitDescriptionGeneric: View this book's AI progress and next action.
list.cockpitError: Cannot read AI status for this book. Please try again later.
list.cockpitFallback: This book has no AI auto tasks that need attention.

create.title: Create novel project
create.description: Clarify upfront who this book is for, what hooks readers, and what the first 30 chapters need to deliver. These settings drive storyline planning, world boundaries, writing suggestions and AI generation behavior — you can still adjust after creation.

preview.title: Novel preview
preview.missingNovelDescription: Go back to the novel list and pick a work to preview.
preview.subtitle: Read generated chapters in order. Great for checking flow, pacing and what's been written so far.
preview.loadErrorDescription: Cannot read chapters right now. You can reload.
preview.noChaptersDescription: Go to the workspace to generate a chapter outline or content first, then come back to preview the full book.
preview.noChapterContentTitle: This chapter has no body yet
preview.noChapterContentDescription: Generate or write the body in the chapter editor, then the full content will appear here.
preview.copyEmptyError: This chapter has no content to copy.
preview.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please select the text and copy manually.

chapterEdit.loadError: Failed to load chapter. Refresh and try again.
chapterEdit.notFound: Cannot find the chapter. It may have been deleted, or the link is incomplete.

editor.takeoverDismissed: Director takeover reminder collapsed. You can still continue from Execution details when needed.
editor.noAutoExecuteDirectorTask: No auto-director task available for auto-execution.

worldInjection.notBound: No world is bound. Generation will not inject world rules.

basicTab.takeoverTitle: Let the AI take over from this project
basicTab.takeoverDescription: If you already filled in basic info, you can hand off to auto-director from the current step and choose to continue existing progress or re-run the current step.
basicTab.supplementDescription: Quick title fill is right next to the title field above. This area is for confirming the writing style and tidying up the book's world boundaries before drafting.

directorTakeoverPanel.intro: Before takeover we read the project's real progress, and clearly tell you what will be skipped, continued or re-run this time.

characterDiagnostics.title: Cast and relationship diagnostics
characterDiagnostics.description: Better expanded when you need to fill roles, find gaps or sort out relationships. For day-to-day editing, see the character workspace below.

candidateDialog.title: Confirm book-level direction
candidateDialog.description: Compare the book directions the AI proposes. You can tweak the title or plan first, then pick one to create the project.

worldSlice.refreshed: Refreshed the world settings this book will use.
worldSlice.saved: Saved this book's world setting retentions.

chapterPlanning.hasBlockingIssues: Open high-priority audit issues exist. We recommend re-planning subsequent chapters.
chapterPlanning.noBlockingIssues: No blocking audit issues right now. No need to re-plan subsequent chapters.

characterFocus.relationPending: Relation to protagonist to be filled
